character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Discussed Flint's treasure, expressed eagerness to find it, and planned to recruit others for the expedition.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Analyzed the account book and map, collaborated with the squire on the treasure hunt.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Participated in deciphering the treasure documents and strategizing the expedition.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned as a companion to the doctor and part of the group planning the expedition.

character_dossiers.name: Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Referred to as a cabin-boy to be recruited for the expedition.

character_dossiers.name: Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned as a potential crew member for the expedition.

character_dossiers.name: Joyce
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned as a potential crew member for the expedition.

character_dossiers.name: Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned as a potential crew member for the expedition.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Associated with the sealed paper and the thimble found in his pocket.
